productDisplayName: Nina Ricci Women Air Temps Perfume
description: Style NoteThe timeless fragrance L'Air du temps by nina ricci remains one of the greatest fragrance creations even now. The fragrance was launched after the World War II, in 1948, and the dove on the cap is a symbol of peace. With floral-spicy notes of the carnation in the centre of its composition, the perfume also features scents of bergamot, rosewood, rose, jasmine, violet, iris with woody notes of cedar and sandal, sensual musk and amber. Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
